and then intercostal muscles are cut between the fourth and the fifth rib.

which are clipped, as you can see over here.
So they make it also easier for the radiation oncologist to delineate the radiation field in case that radiotherapy is necessary after the operation.

We continue the dissection on the pericardium, but you can see there are quite a lot of tough adhesions, and there was some suspicion that the tumor invaded the pericardium, so we dissected around it.
